text: Trump says he won’t apologize to Pope Leo: I won’t apologize. Pope Leo said things that are wrong. I think Pope Leo is very weak on crime.
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不会向教皇利奥道歉：我不会道歉。教皇利奥说的话是错误的。我认为教皇利奥在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on Iran's amibitions: "Iran is a, wants to be a nuclear nation. So they can exterminate the world. Not gonna happen." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 President Trump on posting an image of himself depicted as Jesus Christ: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor, and had to do with Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker there, which we support... It’s supposed to be me as a doctor, making people better. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及伊朗的野心：‘伊朗是一个，想要成为一个核国家。这样他们就可以消灭世界。这不会发生。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 特朗普总统谈及发布一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片：我确实发布了它，我以为那是我作为一名医生，与红十字会有关，作为那里的一名红十字会工作人员，我们支持这一点……它本意是我作为一名医生，让人们变得更好。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says he won’t apologize to Pope Leo: I won’t apologize. Pope Leo said things that are wrong. I think Pope Leo is very weak on crime.
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不会向教皇利奥道歉：我不会道歉。教皇利奥说的话是错误的。我认为教皇利奥在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。

text: Trump: We’ve been called this morning — by the right people, the appropriate people — and they want to work a deal. They would like to work a deal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们今天早上接到了电话——来自合适的人，相关的人——他们想要达成一项协议。他们希望能达成一项协议。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Strait of Hormuz U.S. blockade: Reporter: "Has the blockade started, sir? Trump: "Yeah. Started 10:00." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on Iran's amibitions: "Iran is a, wants to be a nuclear nation. So they can exterminate the world. Not gonna happen." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及霍尔木兹海峡美国封锁：记者：‘封锁开始了吗，先生？’ 特朗普：‘是的。10点开始。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及伊朗的野心：‘伊朗是一个，想要成为一个核国家。这样他们就可以消灭世界。这不会发生。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: We can’t let a country blackmail or extort the world. That’s what they’re doing — they’re really blackmailing the world. We’re not going to let that happen.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们不能让一个国家勒索或敲诈世界。这就是他们正在做的——他们实际上是在勒索世界。我们不会让这种情况发生。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump had McDonald’s DoorDashed to the White House before making statements to the press. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Strait of Hormuz U.S. blockade: Reporter: "Has the blockade started, sir? Trump: "Yeah. Started 10:00." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在向媒体发表声明前，通过DoorDash点了麦当劳送到白宫。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及霍尔木兹海峡美国封锁：记者：‘封锁开始了吗，先生？’ 特朗普：‘是的。10点开始。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: Iran will never have a nuclear weapon. If they don’t agree, there’s no deal.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗永远不会拥有核武器。如果他们不同意，就没有协议。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump had McDonald’s DoorDashed to the White House before making statements to the press. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在向媒体发表声明前，通过DoorDash点了麦当劳送到白宫。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The British Ministry of Defence reports they're deploying additional military planners to the U.S. CENTCOM's area of operation to support efforts to make the Strait of Hormuz safe again. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为和平的多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议，以恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由。该倡议将……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 英国国防部报告称，他们正在向美国中央司令部的行动区域部署额外的军事规划人员，以支持使霍尔木兹海峡再次安全的工作。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: We are going to get the dust back; we will get it back from them, or we will take it.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们要拿回那些尘土；我们要么从他们那里拿回来，要么我们就去夺取。

text: Trump: We’ve been called by the other side. They’d like to make a deal very badly.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们接到了对方的电话。他们非常渴望达成协议。

text: Barbaric members of the Jewish faith continues to demolish civilian houses and villas in south Lebanon. This video is taken from Naqoura
text_zh: 犹太信仰的野蛮成员继续拆毁黎巴嫩南部的平民房屋和别墅。这段视频拍摄于纳库拉（Naqoura）

text: Open Source Intel Israel estimates that despite the collapse of talks in Pakistan, the U.S. and Iran will return to the negotiating table. Meanwhile, the IDF Chief of Staff met with the CENTCOM commander to prepare for a return to war if diplomacy fails. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列估计，尽管在巴基斯坦的谈判破裂，美国和伊朗仍将回到谈判桌前。与此同时，以色列国防军总参谋长会见了中央司令部司令，为外交失败后的重返战争做准备。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has stated that 34 ships transited the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday, which he claims to be the highest number since the start of the Iran War. Prior to the conflict, roughly 140 cargo ships and tankers passed everyday through the Hormuz Strait. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043730531276243451/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，周日有34艘船只通过了霍尔木兹海峡，他声称这是自伊朗战争开始以来的最高数字。冲突前，每天约有140艘货船和油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043730531276243451/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu congratulates Hungary's prime minister-elect Magyar. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043729990953357490/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）内塔尼亚胡祝贺匈牙利当选总理马扎尔（Magyar）。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043729990953357490/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "34 Ships went through the Strait of Hormuz yesterday, which is by far the highest number since this foolish closure began." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043729640582234433/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“昨天有34艘船只通过了霍尔木兹海峡，这是自这场愚蠢的封锁开始以来数量最多的一次。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043729640582234433/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump said that any Iranian fast attack boats approaching the current U.S. blockade would be “immediately destroyed,” similar to vessels used by terrorist or drug-trafficking groups. 📌 He stated that Iran’s navy has been largely destroyed, with 158 ships and boats eliminated, leaving only a small number of fast attack craft. 📌 Trump warned that if any of these vessels come near the blockade, they will be instantly neutralized using the same rapid and forceful methods applied against drug smuggling boats at sea. 📌 He also claimed that 98.2% of drugs entering the United States by sea have been intercepted. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普表示，任何接近当前美国封锁的伊朗快速攻击艇都将被“立即摧毁”，类似于恐怖组织或贩毒集团使用的船只。 📌 他指出，伊朗海军已基本被摧毁，158艘舰艇和船只被消灭，只剩下少量快速攻击艇。 📌 特朗普警告说，如果这些船只中的任何一艘靠近封锁区，它们将使用与海上打击走私船只相同的快速和强力手段被立即消灭。 📌 他还声称，98.2%通过海路进入美国的毒品已被拦截。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israel has intensified preparations for a possible escalation with Iran following the collapse of U.S.–Iran talks and the start of the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, according to Israeli Channel 14. ➡️ The Israeli defense establishment assesses that Iran could likely launch large-scale missile attacks on Israel in response to the blockade and says forces are preparing for rapid retaliation in full coordination with the U.S. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据以色列第14频道报道，在美伊谈判破裂和美国开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡后，以色列加强了应对与伊朗可能升级的准备。 ➡️ 以色列国防机构评估认为，伊朗很可能会针对封锁对以色列发动大规模导弹袭击，并表示部队正在与美国全面协调，准备迅速报复。推文

text: Open Source Intel The Israeli Air Force struck approximately 150 Hezbollah targets across southern Lebanon in the past 24 hours, including rocket launchers, drone sites, military structures, anti-tank missile positions, and terror command centers. - IDF https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043728588592030132/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列空军在过去24小时内打击了黎巴嫩南部约150个真主党目标，包括火箭发射器、无人机阵地、军事建筑、反坦克导弹阵地和恐怖指挥中心。 - 以色列国防军 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043728588592030132/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Jeff21461 : Still got no one that claimed responsibility for the delivery of these to Ukraine. Looks like the first ex-Danish 🇩🇰 M109A3DK was destroyed in 🇺🇦 Ukraine Without location or source https://twitter.com/aloha9916/status/2043431078422048982/photo/1 - Aloha tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to Axios’ Barak Ravid, citing a U.S. official, “There is continued engagement between the U.S. and Iran and forward motion on trying to get to an agreement,” following this past weekend’s failed peace talks between the two countries in Islamabad, Pakistan. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043728184164667779/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据Axios的巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）援引一位美国官员的话说，在过去这个周末两国在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的和平谈判失败后，“美国和伊朗之间仍在继续接触，并在努力达成协议方面取得了进展。” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043728184164667779/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukraine's drone forces struck a Russian chemicals plant in Cherepovets that produces raw materials for TNT, hexogen, and munitions components, according to Kyiv's drone forces commander. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043727896376742059/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）据基辅无人机部队指挥官称，乌克兰无人机部队袭击了切列波韦茨（Cherepovets）的一家俄罗斯化工厂，该厂生产TNT、黑索金和弹药部件的原材料。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043727896376742059/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Confirming reports that the U.S. and Indonesia were looking to increase military-to-military cooperation, the U.S. Department of War has released a statement detailing the upgrade of the U.S.-Indonesia defense relationship to a Major Defense Cooperation Partnership (MDCP). Per the release, the MDCP will be centered around, military modernization and capacity building, training, professional military education (PME), and exercises/unspecified operational cooperation. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 证实了美国和印度尼西亚寻求加强军事间合作的报道，美国战争部发布了一份声明，详细说明了将美印防务关系升级为主要防务合作伙伴关系（MDCP）。根据发布的内容，MDCP将以军事现代化和能力建设、训练、专业军事教育（PME）以及演习/未指明的作战合作为中心。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. official tells Axios: "There is continued engagement between the U.S. and Iran and forward motion on trying to get to an agreement" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）美国官员告诉Axios：“美国和伊朗之间仍在继续接触，并在努力达成协议方面取得了进展。”推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump said that any Iranian fast attack boats approaching the current U.S. blockade would be “immediately destroyed,” similar to how vessels used by terrorist or drug-trafficking groups are targeted. 📌 He claimed Iran’s navy has been largely destroyed, with 158 vessels eliminated, leaving only a small number of fast attack craft. 📌 Trump warned that if any of these boats come near the blockade, they will be swiftly neutralized using the same rapid-response methods employed against drug smuggling vessels. 📌 He also added that 98.2% of drugs entering the U.S. by sea have been intercepted. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普表示，任何接近当前美国封锁的伊朗快速攻击艇都将被“立即摧毁”，类似于针对恐怖组织或贩毒集团使用的船只的方式。 📌 他声称伊朗海军已基本被摧毁，158艘舰艇被消灭，只剩下少量快速攻击艇。 📌 特朗普警告说，如果这些船只中的任何一艘靠近封锁区，它们将使用与打击走私船只相同的快速反应手段被迅速消灭。 📌 他还补充说，98.2%通过海路进入美国的毒品已被拦截。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Trump appears to have deleted his post depicting himself as Jesus following backlash from his own supporters. @kaitlancollins https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043727111513411998/photo/1 Earlier tonight: U.S. President Donald Trump on Truth Social shared a post depicting himself as Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043537626032988463/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）最新 🔴 特朗普在遭到其支持者的强烈反对后，似乎删除了将自己描绘成耶稣的帖子。 @kaitlancollins https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043727111513411998/photo/1 今晚早些时候：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在Truth Social上分享了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043537626032988463/photo/1 - 开源情报（Open Source Intel）推文

text: Open Source Intel IMPORTANT CORRECTION 🔴 I have deleted this post. Although the original photographer shared it as recent, it appears to be recycled from 2023. H/T @FaytuksNetwork https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043726537304756697/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Russia has reportedly been forced to look for alternatives to its Pantsir air defense systems. ▪️ According to Ukrainian Defense Ministry adviser Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov, a sharp shortage of Pantsir systems is emerging amid the growing strain on air defense assets. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇷🇺 据报道，俄罗斯被迫为其“铠甲”（Pantsir）防空系统寻找替代品。 ▪️ 据乌克兰国防部顾问谢尔希·“闪电”（Serhii “Flash”）·贝斯克雷斯特诺夫称，在防空资产压力日益增大的情况下，铠甲系统出现了严重短缺。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reports say scores of empty oil tankers are heading to the U.S. as global flows shift following disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz. Harris Faulkner: "68 of those 121 vessels are very large crude carriers capable of carrying 2 million barrels apiece." “President Trump has urged countries squeezed by Iran's disruption of the Strait of Hormuz to turn to American energy supplies instead.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）有报道称，随着霍尔木兹海峡中断导致全球物流流向改变，大量空油轮正驶向美国。哈里斯·福克纳（Harris Faulkner）：“这121艘船中有68艘是非常大型的原油运输船，每艘能够运载200万桶石油。” “特朗普总统敦促那些因伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的干扰而陷入困境的国家转而寻求美国的能源供应。”推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: “34 Ships went through the Strait of Hormuz yesterday, which is by far the highest number since this foolish closure began.” Question : How many were affiliated with him and his Zionist masters?

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli army radio noted a significant nuance in Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s remarks: The US demand is for no uranium enrichment in Iran “in the coming years, and that could be decades” – not a permanent ban. This suggests a sunset clause…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios : The United States demanded during weekend talks in Islamabad that Iran freeze uranium enrichment for 20 years. Iran countered with a shorter “single digit” period. The U.S. also asked Iran to remove all highly enriched uranium from the country; Tehran agreed to a “monitored process of down‑blending” instead. The nuclear issue was the main sticking point that prevented a deal. Pakistani, Egyptian and Turkish mediators are now trying to bridge the gaps before the ceasefire ends on 21 April. Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said an extension of 45‑60 days could be considered to allow negotiations to continue. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台指出了以色列总理内塔尼亚胡言论中的一个重要细微差别：美国的要求是伊朗在‘未来几年，可能是几十年内’不得进行铀浓缩——而不是永久禁止。这表明有一个日落条款……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国在周末于伊斯兰堡举行的会谈中要求伊朗冻结铀浓缩20年。伊朗反驳称要求一个更短的“个位数”期限。美国还要求伊朗从该国移除所有高浓缩铀；德黑兰则同意进行“受监控的降级过程”。核问题是阻碍达成协议的主要症结。巴基斯坦、埃及和土耳其的调解人现在正试图在停火于4月21日结束前弥合分歧。土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）表示，可以考虑延长45-60天，以允许谈判继续进行。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 Netanyahu on Hungarian election results... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇭🇺 内塔尼亚胡谈匈牙利选举结果…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Russia has delivered a sharp warning to Israel over strikes near the Bushehr nuclear reactor in Iran, saying Israel is “playing with fire” and could lead to a “nuclear catastrophe." Moscow repeatedly protested after an Israeli strike landed close to Russian personnel, whose presence the IDF was "unaware of." Russia has since evacuated most of its staff from the Bushehr facility. A senior Kremlin official wrote to Jerusalem: “You are putting our people in danger. This is a dangerous game that could lead to a huge nuclear disaster with severe consequences for the entire Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：俄罗斯就以色列在伊朗布什尔核反应堆附近的袭击向以色列发出了严厉警告，称以色列是在“玩火”，可能导致“核灾难”。在一次以色列袭击落在俄罗斯人员附近后，莫斯科多次提出抗议，以色列国防军对此“并不知情”。此后，俄罗斯已从布什尔设施撤离了大部分员工。一位克里姆林宫高级官员写信给耶路撒冷：“你们正在将我们的人民置于危险之中。这是一场危险的游戏，可能导致一场巨大的核灾难，对整个中东产生严重后果。” @wfwitness

text: Benjamin Netanyau says the Trump administration reports to him DAILY. "I spoke yesterday with Vice President JD Vance. He called me from his plane on the way back from Washington. He reported to me in detail, as the people of this administration do every day, on the development of the negotiations." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，特朗普政府每天都向他汇报。“我昨天与副总统JD·万斯通了话。他在从华盛顿回来的飞机上给我打了电话。他详细地向我汇报了谈判的进展，正如这届政府的人每天所做的那样。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan: Senior IDF officials have briefed Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, ahead of his meetings with Lebanese ambassador Nada Hamada Maoued in Washington. The unusual briefing was requested by the ambassador and approved by the chief of staff Eyal Zamir and defence minister Israel Katz. Military officials presented the deployment of forces in Lebanon, Israel’s security demands, and conveyed that Israel is acting "only against Hezbollah." They demanded that the Lebanese army act against Hezbollah in accordance with the Lebanese government’s own decision before a ceasefire can be considered. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：以色列国防军高级官员在以色列驻美国大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）与黎巴嫩大使娜达·哈马达·马乌德（Nada Hamada Maoued）在华盛顿会晤前，向其进行了简报。这次不同寻常的简报是由大使要求的，并得到了总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）和国防部长以色列·卡茨（Israel Katz）的批准。军方官员介绍了在黎巴嫩的兵力部署、以色列的安全要求，并传达了以色列“仅针对真主党”采取行动的信息。他们要求黎巴嫩军队在考虑停火之前，按照黎巴嫩政府自己的决定对真主党采取行动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli Air Force said it targeted approximately 150 alleged Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon over the past day, including rocket launchers, drones, military buildings, anti‑tank launch sites and headquarters. The military also said it targeted groups that were planning attacks on Israeli troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列空军表示，在过去一天里，他们打击了黎巴嫩南部约150个所谓的真主党目标，包括火箭发射器、无人机、军事建筑、反坦克发射阵地和总部。军方还表示，他们打击了计划袭击以色列军队的团体。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 So... Yeah, the man has lost it 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 Trump deleted his "MAGA Jesus" post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 所以……是的，这个人疯了 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 特朗普删除了他的“MAGA耶稣”帖子。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth met with Indonesian Defence Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin at the Pentagon, where the two leaders agreed to elevate the bilateral defence relationship to a Major Defence Cooperation Partnership. The partnership focuses on military modernisation, training and professional military education, and exercises and operational cooperation. The two nations will explore co‑developing asymmetric capabilities in maritime, subsurface and autonomous systems, and will enhance joint special forces training. Indonesia was commended for its role in the Board of Peace and the International Stabilisation Force. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未批准美国军用飞机进入其领空。国防部发言人称，一份全面的飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，也不具备法律约束力……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼会见了印度尼西亚国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁（Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin），两位领导人同意将双边防务关系提升为主要防务合作伙伴关系。该伙伴关系侧重于军事现代化、训练和专业军事教育，以及演习和作战合作。两国将探索在海上、水下和自主系统方面共同开发非对称能力，并将加强联合特种部队训练。印度尼西亚因其在和平委员会和国际稳定部队中的作用而受到赞扬。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 Chinese Defense Ministry: Chinese ships continue to move in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran, which we will respect and abide by. We expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz, and has opened it to us.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇨🇳 中国国防部：中国船只继续在霍尔木兹海峡水域进出。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议，我们将尊重并遵守这些协议。我们希望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并已向我们开放。

text: Trump has deleted the post portraying himself as Jesus Christ. Know why? Because he forgot that the above figures in the sun are demons not angels
text_zh: 特朗普删除了将自己描绘成耶稣基督的帖子。知道为什么吗？因为他忘了太阳里的那些人物是恶魔而不是天使

text: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Hungary’s incoming government says it won’t oppose an EU €90bn loan to Ukraine, but also won’t take part in the scheme, Magyar said. He added the issue can be discussed with future EU counterparts. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 匈牙利新政府表示，不会反对欧盟向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款，但也不会参与该计划，马扎尔说。他补充说，这个问题可以与未来的欧盟同行讨论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump posts image portraying himself as Jesus Christ." Trump has deleted the post portraying himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普发布了一张将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。” 特朗普已经删除了将自己描绘成耶稣基督的帖子。
